name: Move Wrench
description: Adds sub-voxel block movement to the base game wrench. Right-click a door, trapdoor, or fence gate face with the wrench to push it away from that face. Press F (while holding the wrench) to pick a step size (1/2/4 voxels). Sneak + right-click to snap back to alignment. Paired (double) doors and two-tall doors move together. Wrench rotation on non-door blocks is unaffected.
